name: Bang Overseas Limited
summary: Bang Overseas Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and trades in textile and textile products in India and internationally. The company offers men's formal and casual wear under the Thomas Scott, Italian Gold, Hammersmith, Bang & Scott, Bang Europa, and FCC brands. It is also involved in the trading of fabric products. Bang Overseas Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
